nasb.text: The Levites, from the sons of the Kohathites and of the sons of the Korahites, stood up to praise the Lord God of Israel, with a very loud voice.

esv.text: And the Levites, of the Kohathites and the Korahites, stood up to praise the Lord, the God of Israel, with a very loud voice.

cnv.text: 哥轄子孫中和可拉子孫中的利未人，都站起來高聲讚美耶和華以色列的　神。

ccb.text: 哥辖族和可拉族的利未人都站起来，高声赞美以色列的上帝耶和华。
